name: Ingress Tool Transfer
description: Detects transfer of tools into the environment using common download utilities
query:
// Detect tool transfer into the environment
// Trigger on download utilities retrieving executables
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(curl|wget|Invoke-WebRequest|certutil.*-urlcache|bitsadmin.*transfer|Start-BitsTransfer).*\.(exe|dll|ps1|bat|vbs|hta|py|sh)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
